note_bug: train_court_model_v2.py:560 passes DataLoader(in_order=True) when synthetic_workers>0; this VM's pinned torch==2.5.1+cu124 does not support that kwarg (added in a later torch release) -- crashes immediately. Worked around via documented --synthetic-workers 0 CLI flag (no code change). This forces single-threaded CPU-bound synthetic sample generation, which dominates step wall-time (GPU mostly idle at batch=256, ~8.87s/step). Re-probed at batch=32: 0.60 steps/sec, GPU compute is NOT the bottleneck on this SKU under this workaround.
